title: Senior Structured Finance Associate / Manager (Banking, Perm) UID:2269
description:
Job Description

• Support the execution of financing transactions across the energy, new energy, renewables, infrastructure, and transportation sectors, covering the full lifecycle from origination to drawdown

• Perform transaction structuring and financial modelling, including development of financial models and sensitivity analyses for client and lender assessment

• Conduct due diligence and prepare financing and loan documentation in coordination with internal and external stakeholders

• Prepare and present credit applications to the internal Credit Committee and manage the credit approval process with the Credit Department and back office

• Assist in sourcing and originating new financing opportunities through market research, industry analysis, and preparation of proposals and pitchbooks

• Manage and monitor loan portfolios throughout the transaction life cycle, including ongoing relationship management

• Support client onboarding activities by providing guidance on KYC and internal onboarding requirements

• Oversee post-execution transaction management, including monitoring covenant compliance and processing waivers, amendments, and special credit requests

• Ensure adherence to external regulatory requirements and internal policies, proactively escalating operational or risk issues to management as required

• Review, comment on, and support execution of financing documentation and facility agreements

• Administer loan processing and closing for all loan products, ensuring all conditions precedent are satisfied prior to borrower requests, drawdowns, or repayments

• Handle day-to-day syndicated loan administration, including drawdowns, rollovers, rate setting, billing, prepayments, fee calculations, payments, and document safekeeping

• Liaise with sponsors, legal counsel, technical, tax, and financial advisers throughout due diligence and documentation phases of project finance transactions

• Conduct ad hoc research and financial analysis to support new business initiatives and portfolio management

• Collaborate closely with team members across the Bank and undertake additional projects or responsibilities as assigned

Job Requirements

• Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business, Engineering, or a related discipline; CFA qualification is an advantage

• Strong financial modelling expertise, with hands-on experience in structuring and building complex financial models

• Minimum of 3 years’ financial analysis, credit analysis, financial modelling experience in structured finance and/or corporate finance

• Solid understanding of the full project finance lifecycle, including structuring, bidding, due diligence, documentation, financial close, and waiver requests

• Knowledge of credit evaluation processes, loan accounting, and related policies

• Collaborative and positive team player with strong stakeholder management skills

• Proven ability to prioritize effectively, manage multiple tasks simultaneously, and provide leadership when required

• Highly motivated self-starter with a fast learning curve and the ability to think independently

• Proficient in Microsoft Office applications, with advanced skills in Excel, including macros and VBA

• Strong interpersonal and communication skills (both verbal and written)

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Interested candidates may apply through the application system. We regret to inform only Shortlisted candidates will be notified.

PERSOL Singapore Pte Ltd • RCB No. 200007268E • EA License No. 01C4394

You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to PERSOLKELLY Singapore Pte Ltd and its local and overseas subsidiaries and affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data to prospective employers/companies based in any country for purposes of evaluating  suitability for employment, conducting reference checks, administering employment related services, complying with Government’s health advisories and such other purposes stated in our Privacy Policy.

Our full Privacy Policy is available at https://www.persolsingapore.com/policies.  If you wish to withdraw your consent, please drop us an email at "sg.dataprotection@persolapac.com" to let us know. Please feel free to contact us if you have any queries.

For more information, please visit www.persolsingapore.com
